Table of Contents

Interface IRasterBuilder3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster builder.

[Guid("C8CDA4C3-DA95-4EB9-9C3D-D8D11889C4AA")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterBuilder3 : IRasterBuilder2, IRasterBuilder

bool

MergeItems 

bool MergeItems { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

MultidimensionalInfo

The multidimensional info object associated with the raster builder. The information contained within this object is updated each time a new item is built.

IMultidimensionalInfo MultidimensionalInfo { get; set; }

Property Value

IMultidimensionalInfo
